title: Waypoint IK Result
description: Result of solving IK (Tier 1 point or Tier 2 sequential) for a single target pose. Position error unit: meter. Orientation error unit: degree. Joint angle unit: radian.

waypoint_id.description: Identifier of the sample or waypoint this result corresponds to.

converged.description: Whether the solver met the position/orientation success thresholds within max_iterations.

joint_configuration_rad.description: Resulting joint configuration [q1..q7] in radians, in joint_1..joint_7 order.

position_error_m.description: Euclidean position error between achieved and target end-effector position, in meters.

orientation_error_deg.description: SO(3) logarithm (geodesic) orientation error between achieved and target end-effector orientation, in degrees.

iterations.description: Number of DLS iterations performed for this solve.

singular_value_min.description: Optional smallest singular value of the end-effector Jacobian at the final configuration (singularity proximity indicator).
